title: Add Location Column to show a map on a card cover
excerpt: It would be great to have more column options for the Card Cover in a dashboard.  The location column, bringing up the map view would make a useful cover so at a glance we can see where a client is and what services are …

posts.author: lalahess (Linda Sikes )
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to have more column options for the Card Cover in a dashboard. The location column, bringing up the map view would make a useful cover so at a glance we can see where a client is and what services are available to them.
